# Sazami

> Generated by docmd

## Documentation Files

- [API Reference](https://nisoku.org/Sazami/docs/api-reference/)
  Complete public API for compileSakko, transformer, config, and curvomorphism
- [Component Base](https://nisoku.org/Sazami/docs/component-base/)
  Base component system, handler management, and events
- [Config & Theming](https://nisoku.org/Sazami/docs/config-theming/)
  Design token system, CSS custom properties, and custom theme configuration
- [Curvomorphism](https://nisoku.org/Sazami/docs/curvomorphism/)
  Directional corner-rounding algorithm and usage
- [Sazami Documentation](https://nisoku.org/Sazami/docs/)
  A zero-dependency UI engine with the Sakko DSL, semantic web components, and design tokens
- [Sazami Primitives](https://nisoku.org/Sazami/docs/primitives/)
  All 48 semantic Web Components with attributes, modifiers, and examples
